title: Command Cockpit Desktop Footer Pin
summary: Pinned the Overview mounted-stage footer rail inside the desktop Command Cockpit so level, quest, gate, and next-move state stay visible instead of falling below the stage.
proof: Changed the Command Cockpit Overview footer rail to sticky positioning with a six-pixel stage-bottom offset.
Kept the mobile rail compression intact while making the desktop stage surface retain the live status rail.
Verified the live 1440x900 cockpit: rail bottom 824.6px, stage bottom 837.6px, rail inside stage, visible in viewport, and no horizontal overflow.
